title: Choose board view for table widget
excerpt:
When adding a table widget to a dashboard, I need the ability to choose which board view I want the widget to display.  Right now, it will only show the Main Table no matter what.

posts.author: rbailey (Rachel Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml:
When adding a table widget to a dashboard, I need the ability to choose which board view I want the widget to display. Right now, it will only show the Main Table no matter what.

I see lots of requests to be able to sort, group, etc. in the table widget. But if users could just choose which board view displays in the widget, monday wouldn’t need to build out all those features. Even if the table widget was set to display the first pinned view on the selected board, users would be able to do all their customization at the board-level and then choose the pinned view they’ve already crafted to display in the table widget.
